# Images

Place all your photos in this folder with EXACTLY these filenames:

| Filename | Used in |
|---|---|
| `professional-picture.jpeg` | Hero section (your headshot) |
| `dissertation-defense.jpeg` | Dissertation card |
| `aspa-presentation-2024.jpeg` | Gallery reel |
| `aspa-close.jpeg` | Gallery reel |
| `aspa-wide.jpeg` | Gallery reel |
| `foreign-aid-presentation.jpeg` | Gallery reel |
| `conference-colleagues.jpeg` | Gallery reel |
| `abfm-conference.jpeg` | Gallery reel |
| `research-presentation.jpeg` | Gallery reel |
| `oxford-penn-email.png` | Gallery reel |
| `appam-certificate.jpeg` | Gallery reel |
| `appam-fellowship-stage.jpeg` | Gallery reel |
| `appam-group.jpeg` | Gallery reel |
| `classroom.jpeg` | Teaching section |

Supported formats: .jpeg, .jpg, .png, .webp
